channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
item.description: As growth slows, Truecaller is leaning on subscriptions, business services, and new features to sustain momentum beyond India.

item.title: Euphoria just did its version of the Red Wedding
item.description: "Euphoria" Season 3, episode 3 dives into Nate and Cassie's mess of a wedding.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 27, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 27, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 27, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1773 on April 27 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
